title: Failed to load generator migrations for fernapi/fern-typescript-sdk
rationale: npm install failure (EACCES on rename) in migration cache. loadMigrationModule already wraps non-CliError exceptions as CliError(EnvironmentError) at the boundary.
fixSummary: Already fixed: loadMigrationModule catch block wraps with EnvironmentError.
problemSignature: npm cache rename EACCES inside ensureMigrationsInstalled, caught and wrapped as EnvironmentError by loadMigrationModule.
